# Evergrain Photobooth

> Evergrain Photobooth is a luxury open-air DSLR photo booth rental serving Los Angeles and Orange County. We bring a handcrafted walnut booth, real DSLR image quality, studio lighting, curated props, instant sharing, and an on-site attendant to weddings, corporate events, birthdays, and brand activations.

## Key facts
- Service: open-air DSLR photo booth rental (setup, attendant, prints, and online gallery included)
- Service area: Los Angeles County, Orange County, and surrounding Southern California
- Packages: The Candid ($600), The Moment ($750, most popular), The Glam ($1,050); add-ons available
- Contact: (626) 560-8330 · evergrainphotobooth@gmail.com
- Booking: request a quote at https://evergrainphotobooth.com/get-started

## Main pages
- [Home](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/): overview of the open-air DSLR photo booth experience
- [The Booth](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/the-booth): what the booth is, how it works, what's included
- [Packages](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/packages): the three rental tiers and full feature comparison
- [Add-Ons](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/add-ons): custom templates, backdrops, prints, extra time, and more
- [Our Story](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/our-story): who we are and why we built Evergrain
- [FAQ](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/faq): common questions on pricing, space, setup, and coverage
- [Get Started](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/get-started): request a quote / booking form
- [Areas We Serve](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/areas-we-serve): neighborhoods and regions across LA & OC

## A Thousand Words (blog)
- [A Thousand Words](https://evergrainphotobooth.com/a-thousand-words): planning tips, inspiration, and photo booth guides
